title: viola × hollickii
intro: Viola × hollickii, also known as the hybrid blue viola, is a rare and unique flowering plant that belongs to the violet family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Viola × hollickii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Viola × hollickii include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
